variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 516 Hygroscopic Breathers | Replaces the MP Filtri SAW115-2G03A00P01
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter FS 516 Hygroscopic Breathers | Replaces the MP Filtri SAW115-2G03A00P01
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 516 Hygroscopic Breathers is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAW115-2G03A00P01. Easy to install and replace, the FS 516 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: HYGROSCOPIC BREATHERS, Dimension 1 (D1): 104.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 35.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 23.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 204.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 186.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 157.0 mm
